---
title: "[Your Name]"
subtitle: "[Your Professional Headline]"
image: images/profile.svg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 14em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: ""
      target: _blank
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: ""
      target: _blank
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:"
    - text: "{{< fa file-pdf >}} CV"
      href: CV/cv.pdf
      target: _blank
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

## Welcome

:::: {.hero-quote}
"[Add a short personal quote or guiding principle.]"
::::

This ePortfolio presents my academic journey, experience highlights, and service contributions in a clean section-based format.

---

## Portfolio Sections

::::: {.columns}

::::: {.column width="33%"}
:::: {.experience-card .theme-ocean}
{{< fa user-graduate >}} **Academic Journey**  
[Add a short summary of your studies, concentrations, and milestones.]
::::
:::::

::::: {.column width="33%"}
:::: {.experience-card .theme-sunset}
{{< fa flask >}} **Field and Research Experience**  
[Add a short summary of internships, labs, field periods, or major learning experiences.]
::::
:::::

::::: {.column width="33%"}
:::: {.experience-card .theme-aurora}
{{< fa hands-helping >}} **Clubs and Service**  
[Add a short summary of leadership roles, clubs, sports, and volunteer service.]
::::
:::::

:::::

---

## Quick Navigation

| Section | What to Add |
|---|---|
| About | Background, skills, and professional goals |
| Other Experiences | Clubs, sports, leadership roles, and service |
| Projects | Technical work with executable code and visual output |
| CV | Downloadable CV and qualifications |

---

:::: {.simple-note}
This draft keeps all personal details as placeholders so you can replace text, links, and photos with your own content.
::::
